query:
-- 查詢向量資料庫的統計
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_viral_embeddings) as embedding_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT post_id) FROM ip_viral_embeddings) as unique_posts_with_embedding;
